import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { RouterOutlet, RouterLink, RouterLinkActive } from '@angular/router'; @Component({ selector: 'app-root', standalone: true, imports: [RouterOutlet, RouterLink, RouterLinkActive], templateUrl: './app.component.html', styleUrl: './app.component.css' }) export class AppComponent {}
